title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: What are the immediate consequences of unpaid payroll deductions?

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: Question, will the CRA freeze my bank accounts, garnish receivables, or seize assets right away?

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: Not right away, but they will begin to play games such as contacting your bank, saying to your bank,

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: please lock the account or please give us money. We've covered this before. The CRA does not have

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: access to your bank account. It is the bank that gives them money after they ask for it. They will

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: do that. Yes. And if they follow chapter 10 of the auditor's handbook, then they will call your wife,

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: call your kids, call your staff, trespass all over your land until you give them a no trespassing

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: notice. And they will contact your suppliers, which is why none of you should ever have your

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: client list on your websites. And none of you should ever, ever, ever, ever collect GST or

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: charge GST into the same corporation that you hold assets or client list within.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: everything corporation a has your assets and your client was corporation b is the one that does

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: commerce corporation b has no assets like everyone's got to separate everything why do all

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: of you have just one little corporation thinking it's going to protect you in some way it doesn't

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: work that way that's okay though we're going to talk about corporations in a couple of weeks

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: so they will they're not going to seize your assets what they will do is they will get um

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: a writ, but what they always do to get a writ

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: is they go to tax court,

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: which does not have jurisdiction over equity.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: So if they do go to tax court to get a writ on your property,

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: we file a motion in the superior court of the province where your property is and we get it thrown out because we invoke clause 7 of the taxpayers bill of rights which states you do not owe tax dollars whilst

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: you are in dispute and then we go to the aboriginal international network which is a

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: third-party tribunal which has government funding and government recognition as a legitimate tribunal

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: and they subpoena the cra to come out and the cra never shows up so my clients always win then we

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: take the tribunal victory and we go to court and we win the motion as well. It's a pain in the ass.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: You know the quickest way to not have these problems? Stop snitching on yourself, man.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: Why do you people keep doing your freaking tax returns? It's insane to me. The only reason any

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: of you have tax problems is because you did tax returns in the first place. But enough of that.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: How quickly do they move on enforcement once arrears are identified? Oh, I don't know. We

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: Most of our clients are like two, three years behind in their payroll.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: But I would say that by the time you do get into one full year of being behind in payroll,

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: the harassing phone calls are going to start.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: The letters are going to come in.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: So if you are behind on payroll, we talked to a company this morning, really early too.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: I had to get up at four for this conversation because the guy was in Germany at the time.

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: he has three million dollars of payroll that he has not paid to the CRA and his only solution is

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: to sell the corporation to me and let me take that debt over from him and then the CRA can sue me

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: which you know they won't do so it's possible for anybody to get behind the eight ball when

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: you're dealing with payroll which is also why I have a payroll company and I'll cover that last

title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
text: I'm going to solve everybody's payroll problems in tonight's show
